hashtag
#Forcecraver is looking for experienced professionals to join our team!

💼 Role: BPI Developer / Senior Developer
📍 Location: Remote
⏳ Experience: 5+ Years
📄 Employment Type: Contract / Full-Time
🌍 Note: Candidates must be based in India

🔍 Job Summary:
We are seeking a customer-focused BPI Developer/Senior Developer with strong expertise in BPI architecture and telecom inventory solutions. You will design and implement scalable BPI solutions using modern full-stack technologies and workflow tools.

🛠 Key Responsibilities:
• Design solutions using BPI Data Model Designer & Device Diagram Editor
• Build data ingestion frameworks & workflow automation
• Develop APIs (CRUD & workflow instantiation)
• Integrate northbound interfaces and adapters
• Collaborate in Agile/Waterfall environments
• Ensure quality across development, testing, and deployment

💡 Key Skills:
• BPI architecture & product development
• Java, J2EE, Spring Boot, REST APIs, JSON
• Angular 2+, JavaScript/TypeScript
• Groovy, Drools, customization frameworks
• Databases: Neo4j, Oracle/PostgreSQL
• Workflow: Camunda / BPMN
• Testing: JUnit, Postman, Cucumber, SoapUI

➕ Additional Skills:
GCP, CI/CD, Kafka, ElasticSearch, OAuth2, LDAP, SSO, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Ansible

📡 Mandatory Domain Experience:
Telecom Networks (2G/4G/5G, OSS, NMS/EMS – Nokia/Huawei)
BPI inventory solutions for telecom operators

✨ Good to Have:
DevOps knowledge, German language

📩 Please reach out to me at +919899634637 or jbhatia@forcecraver.com to discuss further.
🔔 Follow @Jitender Bhatia @Forcecraver Technologies for more job updates.

Job Title : Gen AI Solutions Architect
Location: Remote
Contract: C2C
Experience: 10+ years 
Visa Type : H1B
 
Required Skills:
Architectural/technical experience with Gen AI (RAG/chain frameworks, Vector DB searches and embeddings, Agentic AI, etc.)
Architectural/technical expertise with cloud especially GCP, Azure, AWS (native, cloud agnostic, container, etc offerings) and cloud/SAAS systems integration.
Experience designing REST APIs that facilitate a strong developer experience or simplify systems integration.
Experience designing systems that leverage Kafka for messaging/streaming.
Experience with RDBMS and/or NoSQL databases (i.e. MongoDB). Understands the benefits and trade-offs of both. Familiar with normalization and denormalization, sharding, and other data-centric patterns
Experience with the design and development of complex systems; employs a disciplined and rigorous approach
Adept at requirements analysis, estimation, systems and application design, and testing
Familiarity with popular Design Patterns.
Excellent collaboration, influencing, and consensus-building skills. Ability to work with persons in all job functions (e.g. product, program, developers, etc).
Excellent verbal and written communications
Ability to manage multiple competing priorities with minimal supervision. Self-directed
A great team player, with demonstrable experience delivering superior software products via Agile methodologies
Experience on an Agile team
Experience with modern languages, frameworks, and technologies such as Java, JavaScript, Node.js, messaging queuing infrastructures, as well as cloud and on-premise infrastructure and services
Experience with distributed computing architectures, including race conditions, parallelism, and concurrency control
Meeting facilitation with stakeholders, partners and team
 
Desired Skills
 
Knowledge of impending AI agent interoperability “standards”/approached (i.e. Model Context Protocol, Agent2Agent, etc.)
Knowledge of Salesforce AgentForce.
Contact Center technology expertise (Salesforce, Five9, etc.)
A proven track record working as part of a team on large/complex systems
Experience with SAFe Software Development Principles
Experience with distributed caching solutions; understands the factors that enable effective caching
Exposure to CI/CD and DevOps
 
Primary technologies
API-first centric enterprise moving to an AI-first centric enterprise
Azure cloud (compute), GCP (big data), some AWS (digital experience)
Salesforce Service Cloud for user experience (GPS and some MX)

Advancing Your Career This Weekend

For many technology professionals, the weekend provides a strategic opportunity to focus on career progression; Whether updating resumes, researching new roles, or preparing targeted applications for the week ahead.

At OperAxis, we recognize this commitment and specialize in accelerating successful placements for U.S. technology talent. Through our Placement-as-a-Service model, we support US Citizens, Green Card holders, OPT/CPT, and H-1B professionals with expert resume optimization, targeted interview preparation, immigration readiness assistance, and direct placement into contract and full-time roles aligned with major U.S. time zones (EST, CST, MT, PT).

We are actively placing qualified candidates into high-impact opportunities across the Energy, Financial Services, Automotive, and other enterprise sectors, including the following:

• Power BI Developer (GCP, BigQuery, DAX, Power Query) – Atlanta, GA (5 days onsite) 
• Scrum Master – New York, NY area (hybrid, 3 days onsite) 
• Application Development Program Manager – Alpharetta, GA area (hybrid, 3 days onsite) 
• Network Security DevOps Engineer (Fortinet, Automation, Cloud Security) – Spring, TX (100% onsite) 
• Enterprise Identity Engineer (Active Directory, PKI, Tier 0) – Spring, TX (100% onsite) 
• Full Stack Developers (Python + React, .NET with AI/LLM, Java + Angular/React + GCP) – multiple locations 
• Generative AI / LLM Senior Specialist – Dearborn, MI area (4 days onsite) 
• SAP S/4HANA Functional Lead (Order-to-Cash) – Dearborn, MI area (4 days onsite) 
• Data Engineer (GCP, BigQuery, Data Pipelines) – Dearborn, MI area (4 days onsite)

If you are actively pursuing new opportunities this weekend, we invite you to apply directly at; https://operaxis.net/jobs or submit your resume to; hr@operaxis.net. Please include your target role, preferred location, and any relevant details. Our team will conduct a prompt review and provide constructive, actionable feedback.

We look forward to partnering with you on your next career milestone.

👍 If you are job searching this weekend, or tag a colleague who may benefit from these opportunities.

🏗️ Core Architecture Expertise
Architect distributed systems (microservices & event-driven)
Define API strategies, data contracts, and platform standards
Strong knowledge of:

Fault tolerance & resilience patterns

🤖 AI / GenAI Platform Skills

Prompt Engineering & evaluation metrics

API gateways & service mesh
SQL / NoSQL, Kafka, Redis

CI/CD pipelines & Infrastructure as Code

🔹 Backend Architecture Leadership

Microservices & distributed systems

AI/LLM integration in enterprise systems

Freelancing Opportunity | Hiring: Agentic Coding Annotator (Online / Offline Tasks)

🔹 Work Details
Remote Freelancing Opportunity
Short-term contract (approx. 5 weeks)
Full-time commitment (8 hours/day)
Must be comfortable with overlapping work hours
Immediate start

🔹 Role Overview
We are looking for strong, detail-oriented software professionals to work on advanced AI model evaluation and coding tasks. This is not a basic annotation role—it requires solid engineering skills and the ability to read, debug, and validate code.

🔹 Roles & Responsibilities
Execute realistic coding tasks within an agent-based coding environment
Interact with models and evaluate their outputs without bias
Review and analyze model-generated code and solutions
Run commands, execute scripts, and interpret logs
Debug issues and validate correctness of implementations
Perform testing and manual verification of outputs
Rank and grade model responses based on structured evaluation criteria
Write clear, concise, and evidence-based justifications for evaluations
Design multi-step, real-world coding tasks (offline work)
Define user intent, milestones, and expected outputs for tasks
Create and refine task-specific rubrics and evaluation guidelines
Ensure consistency, accuracy, and adherence to defined processes
Review completed tasks for quality, completeness, and compliance
Identify gaps, broken environments, or unclear instructions and escalate with evidence

🔹 Required Skills (Mandatory)
Strong experience in software engineering / coding roles (5+ years preferred)
Hands-on expertise in Python, JavaScript, Java, C/C++, SQL, or similar
Ability to read unfamiliar codebases and debug issues
Experience with CLI/Terminal, Git, and development tools
Strong experience in AI and Data Annotation
Understanding of LLM evaluation / AI model outputs / annotation workflows
Strong analytical thinking and attention to detail
Ability to follow strict guidelines and maintain consistency

📩 Interested candidates can share their resume:

📧 deepika.j@encore-itsolutions.com
📱 WhatsApp: 7093014076

Hiring: Senior Software Engineer (Tafeely Developer) | Bangalore | Contract to Hire


Location: Bangalore, Karnataka
Work Mode: Work From Office
Budget: Up to ₹65 K Per Month
Experience Required: 8+ Years
Notice Period: Immediate to 15 Days Preferred (Exceptional candidates up to 30 Days)

Job Purpose:
The role involves development of APIs including RESTful and SOAP architecture following Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA) and API best practices. The ideal candidate should have strong expertise in Java, backend integrations, API security, and end-to-end digital solution development.

Required Technical Skills:
• Java 8 & J2EE Development
• Spring Boot / Microservices
• Apache Camel
• Groovy
• RESTful APIs & SOAP Web Services
• JSON, XML, Swagger, OpenAPI, WSDL
• JWT, OAuth2, Keycloak
• MQ (IBM MQ / RabbitMQ / Kafka)
• SMPP
• Oracle Databases
• SQL Procedures, Triggers & Scheduling
• UNIX & Shell Scripting
• Maven / Gradle
• Application Servers (Tomcat / WebLogic)
• Jenkins (CI/CD)
• JIRA & Confluence
• API Testing Tools (Postman / SOAP UI / Insomnia)

Good to Have:
• Apigee / API Management Frameworks
• Telecom Domain Knowledge (EAI, OSS/BSS, SIEBEL, etc.)

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop, and manage secure RESTful & SOAP APIs
• Build API-based digital solutions and backend integrations
• Integrate with internal systems and external partners
• Follow API security best practices and industry standards
• Develop Oracle DB scripts, procedures, and triggers
• Manage deployments using CI/CD pipelines
• Collaborate with cross-functional and remote teams
• Ensure timely delivery and production support

Educational Qualification:
Engineering in Telecom, Electronics, Computer Science, or equivalent

📢 Note:
Preference will be given to local candidates or those available for immediate joining.


Interested candidates, please share your updated resume at farheen@s4ia.in
